briefdescription.para: Set the fetch DMA in scatter/gather mode.
Set the push DMA in scatter/gather mode.
CRACEN CryptoMaster configuration indirect mask.
Interrupt on DMA fetch end of block (if enabled in the descriptor, for indirect mode only).
Interrupt on DMA fetch stopped/ended.
Interrupt on DMA fetch bus error.
Interrupt on DMA push end of block (if enabled in the descriptor, for indirect mode only).
Interrupt on DMA push stopped/ended.
Interrupt on DMA push bus error.
CRACEN CryptoMaster interrupts' masks.
Fetch DMA is busy.
Push DMA is busy.
Fetch DMA FIFO is not empty.
Push DMA is waiting for data from a crypto engine.
Soft-resetting.
CRACEN CryptoMaster status busy mask.
Function for setting the DMA fetch pointer to either the buffer from which the DMA will read data (in direct mode), or a pointer to a DMA descriptor (in scatter mode).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data to read, or a read descriptor.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the DMA push pointer to either the buffer into which the DMA will write data (in direct mode), or a pointer to a DMA descriptor (in scatter mode).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the buffer where to write, or a write descriptor.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the DMA's indirect configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask selecting if the push and/or fetch DMA should be in indirect mode. Use nrf_cracen_cm_config_indirect_mask_t for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for soft resetting the CryptoMaster module.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for starting the CryptoMaster.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Both the fetch and push DMA engines will be started simultaneously.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_cracen_cm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_cracen_cm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_cracen_cm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be cleared. Use nrf_cracen_cm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the state of pending interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_cracen_cm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the status of the CryptoMaster.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of busy conditions to be checked. Use nrf_cracen_cm_status_mask_t values for bit masking.
